title: ERD Diagram
subtitle: Visualise the entire model as an entity-relationship diagram.

load.heading: 1. Upload XML
load.subhint: Drop an erwin-dm-v9 file to render its tables and relationships.
load.dropHint: Drop your erwin XML here or click to browse

view.heading: 2. Diagram
view.subhint: Drag to pan, scroll to zoom, hover an entity to highlight its relationships.
view.noEntitiesDesc: This file parsed cleanly but contains no entities to render.
view.legendHover: Hover an entity to highlight its relationships
